ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the regulatory agency */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation or short name of the agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency's role and responsibilities */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the agency */,
  "parent_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent agency, if any */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the agency was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the agency's headquarters */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency's director */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishing_organizations" (
  "publish_org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publishing organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Full name of the publishing organization */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation or short name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization's role and responsibilities */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the organization */,
  "parent_org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent organization, if any */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the organization was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the organization's headquarters */,
  "executive_director_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization's executive director */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publish_org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a document */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., current, superseded, withdrawn) */,
  "reviewed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the version */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was reviewed */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_reviewed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document file */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the document file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  "encryption_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file is encrypted */,
  "encryption_key_id" TEXT /* ID of the encryption key, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, auditor, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the comment is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or feedback */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment, if any, for nested comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES document_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category, if any */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_categories_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES document_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_categories_last_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_category_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category mapping */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category mapping was created */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category mapping */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the category mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_category_map_last_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_category_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES document_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_category_map_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag or keyword */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "parent_tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent tag, if any */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the tag */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_last_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_parent_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_tag_id") REFERENCES document_tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tag_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag mapping */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag mapping was created */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the tag mapping */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the tag mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tag_map_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES document_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tag_map_last_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tag_map_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
